## University of Excellence
Advancing knowledge through global collaboration and impactful research – driving innovation for Vietnam and the world.
#1 
The youngest & fastest university to achieve QS 5 stars in the world 
9300
billion VND investment commitment from Vingroup for VinUni’s next strategic development phase 
10 
research & innovation centers

## CORE VALUES: EXCELLENCE
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/about-vinuniversity/)
E 
###  Empathy 
Sense other people’s emotions, understand others without judgement. 
C 
###  Creativity 
Perceive the world in new ways, make connections, generate solutions. 
L 
###  Leadership Mindset 
Motivate and influence people to act toward achieving a common goal. 
X 
###  eXceptional Capability 
Exceptional capabilities and competencies that are proven determinants of future success. 
E 
###  Entrepreneurial Spirit 
Overcome challenges, be decisive, accept responsibility, be impactful for the society. 
Developing talents for the future 
UNIVERSITY OF EXCELLENCE 
E  : Empathy 
Sense other people’s emotions, understand others without judgement. 
## OUR UNIVERSITY LEADERS
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/governance/)
Previous
###  Le Mai Lan, PhD 
Vice Chairwoman, Vingroup JSC  
President of the University Council, VinUniversity 
> We are looking for people who think different, act different, and make things happen. 
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/people/le-mai-lan-phd/)
![Le Mai Lan, PhD](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/profile2-e1728527405574.png)
###  Tan Yap Peng, Prof. 
Provost, VinUniversity 
> I came to Vietnam to drive breakthroughs with VinUniversity. I hope that VinUniversity will stand as a testament to the power of global collaboration - not only educating resilient global citizens but also creating scientific and technological solutions that contribute to Vietnam’s sustainable development and beyond. 
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/people/tan-yap-peng/)
![Tan Yap Peng, Prof.](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/profile-quotes-2.png)
###  Laurent El Ghaoui, PhD 
Vice Provost of Research & Innovation, VinUniversity  
Director, Center for Environmental Intelligence  
Dean, College of Engineering and Computer Science 
> I am keen on further developing strong ties to institutions worldwide, so our University can become a gateway to a fruitful educational experience abroad for our students. In addition, we will strive to organize research workshops and events here, as well as invite distinguished scholars from around the world. 
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/people/laurent-el-ghaoui-phd-2/)
![Laurent El Ghaoui, PhD](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LEG-2-copy-1-e1740821745874.png)
###  Sunmee Choi, PhD 
Vice Provost of External Engagement, VinUniversity  
Professor of Service Operations Management, College of Business and Management 
> My vision is to help redefine the future of higher education - through bold innovation, meaningful collaboration, and a strong ecosystem that connects students, alumni, industry, and global partners. Together, we can create transformative learning experiences that empower the next generation of changemakers. 
[See more](https://vinuni.edu.vn/people/sunmee-choi/)
![Sunmee Choi, PhD](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Untitled-design-7-e1744182625461.png)
